commands: APP_DIR=.; [ -f package.json ] || APP_DIR=frontend; [ -f "$APP_DIR/package.json" ] || { echo No package.json found in /app or /app/frontend; ls -la; exit 1; }; cd "$APP_DIR"; npm install --include=dev --no-audit --no-fund
APP_DIR=.; [ -f package.json ] || APP_DIR=frontend; [ -f "$APP_DIR/package.json" ] || { echo No package.json found in /app or /app/frontend; ls -la; exit 1; }; cd "$APP_DIR"; npm run build

deploy.startCommand: APP_DIR=.; [ -f package.json ] || APP_DIR=frontend; [ -f "$APP_DIR/package.json" ] || { echo No package.json found in /app or /app/frontend; ls -la; exit 1; }; cd "$APP_DIR"; npm run start
